title: Marcus Makes a Mess
synopsis: Marcus wants to help make pancakes in the kitchen, but everything goes wonderfully wrong in the most hilarious ways as he creates happy messes with his family.

pages.text: Marcus smells something yummy! Mama is making pancakes in the kitchen. "I want to help!" says Marcus. He puts on his tiny blue apron.

illustration.description: Marcus with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, warm brown eyes wearing a tiny blue apron, standing in a cozy kitchen with warm yellow walls. His mama is at the stove making pancakes with steam rising from the pan.
illustration.alt: Marcus putting on his apron in a warm kitchen

pages.text: "You can crack the eggs," says Mama. Marcus holds an egg very carefully. CRACK! The egg goes everywhere except the bowl. Marcus giggles.

illustration.description: Marcus with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, warm brown eyes holding broken eggshells with egg splattered on the kitchen counter. Flour dust floats in warm orange sunlight streaming through the window.
illustration.alt: Marcus with cracked eggs making a mess on the counter

pages.text: "Now we add flour," says Mama. Marcus scoops the flour. WHOOSH! White flour flies everywhere like snow. Marcus looks like a ghost!

illustration.description: Marcus with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, warm brown eyes covered in white flour from head to toe, standing in a cloud of flour dust in the cozy kitchen with warm yellow lighting.
illustration.alt: Marcus covered in flour looking like a ghost

pages.text: Mama laughs and laughs. "You're my little flour monster!" She wipes Marcus's face gently. His warm brown eyes sparkle with joy.

illustration.description: Mama gently wiping flour from Marcus's face, showing his short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, warm brown eyes twinkling with happiness in the cozy kitchen surrounded by warm oranges and yellows.
illustration.alt: Mama cleaning flour off Marcus's happy face

pages.text: Together, they mix the batter. Marcus stirs very slowly this time. The pancakes sizzle and pop in the pan. "We did it!" says Marcus.

illustration.description: Marcus with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, warm brown eyes carefully stirring pancake batter with Mama beside him. Golden pancakes cook on the stove with steam rising in the warm cozy kitchen.
illustration.alt: Marcus and Mama cooking pancakes together successfully

pages.text: The family sits at the dining table. The pancakes are delicious! "Marcus is the best helper," says Papa. Marcus smiles big and takes another bite.

illustration.description: The whole family gathered around the dining table in warm yellow and orange lighting. Marcus with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, warm brown eyes sits proudly eating pancakes with his family in their cozy home.
illustration.alt: Marcus eating pancakes happily with his family at the table

metadata.illustrationStyle: cozy kitchen home, family cooking together, warm yellows oranges, steam and flour, aprons, everyday love moments, dining table, family gathering, homemade food

questions.question: What does Marcus want to help make?
questions.explanation: Marcus wants to help Mama make pancakes in the kitchen!

questions.question: What happens when Marcus cracks the egg?
questions.explanation: The egg goes everywhere except in the bowl when Marcus tries to crack it!

questions.question: What makes Marcus look like a ghost?
questions.explanation: Marcus gets covered in white flour and looks like a ghost!

questions.question: Where does the family eat the pancakes?
questions.explanation: The family sits together at the dining table to eat their delicious pancakes!
